Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Phenylpropanoid pathway leading to isoflavone biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Manipulation may alter precursor supply for isoflavone enrichment.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Deaminates phenylalanine to cinnamic acid, initiating phenylpropanoid metabolism.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive association with isoflavone accumulation as an upstream biosynthetic gene induced by GmMYB4 and GmMAPK6.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR downstream-expression analysis; promoter binding by GmMYB115-GmTT8 in Y1H.
Pathway_Genes.Developmental_or_Physiological_Context: V3 leaves in GmMYB4 transgenic plants; hairy roots in GmMAPK6 overexpression.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function: Assigned by gene annotation and established pathway role; no new enzyme assay in this paper.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Classical first committed step of phenylpropanoid pathway; expression coregulated with isoflavone accumulation.
Pathway_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: Candidate pathway gene selected from RNA-seq DEGs and pathway knowledge.
Pathway_Genes.Genetic_Population: Transgenic lines in Jack; hairy roots in Jack.
Pathway_Genes.Metabolite_Assay_Method: UPLC-DAD for isoflavones; gene expression by RT-qPCR.
Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Promoter among those bound by GmMYB115-GmTT8 complex rather than directly by GmMYB4.
Pathway_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: Expression significantly upregulated in GmMYB4 OE and downregulated in gmmyb4; also upregulated by GmMAPK6 OE; exact fold values NA.

Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Phenylpropanoid pathway leading to isoflavone biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Useful upstream target to enhance flux toward isoflavones.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydroxylates cinnamic acid to p-coumaric acid.
Pathway_Genes.Cofactor_or_Coenzyme_Requirement: Cytochrome P450 monooxygenase; requires NADPH and oxygen
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive upstream contributor to isoflavone biosynthesis; expression rises with GmMYB4 activity.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR; promoter binding by GmMYB115-GmTT8 in Y1H.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function: Gene annotation and canonical pathway assignment.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Acts directly after PAL in phenylpropanoid entry route.
Pathway_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: RNA-seq DEG and candidate pathway analysis.
Pathway_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: Significantly upregulated in GmMYB4 OE and downregulated in gmmyb4; exact fold values NA.

Pathway_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Engineering target for increasing flavonoid intermediates and isoflavone production.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Condenses p-coumaroyl-CoA with malonyl-CoA to form chalcone intermediates.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive contributor to isoflavone biosynthesis; expression is promoted by GmMYB4 and involved in MBW-regulated targets.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR; promoter binding by GmMYB115-GmTT8 in Y1H; expression response to GmMAPKK2.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Early flavonoid branch enzyme leading to chalcone formation.
Pathway_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: RNA-seq DEG and candidate pathway analysis.
Pathway_Genes.Genetic_Population: Transgenic lines in Jack; hairy roots.
Pathway_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: Expression significantly upregulated in GmMYB4 OE and downregulated in gmmyb4; affected by GmMAPKK2 OE; exact values NA.

Pathway_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Useful to enhance legume-specific isoflavone branch flux.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Reduces chalcone intermediates in cooperation with CHS to favor deoxychalcone/liquiritigenin formation for isoflavone biosynthesis.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive contributor to isoflavone accumulation; expression induced by GmMYB4 and GmMAPK6.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function: Annotation and established pathway role in legumes.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Acts with CHS upstream of liquiritigenin synthesis in isoflavone branch.
Pathway_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: RNA-seq DEG and pathway candidate analysis.
Pathway_Genes.Genetic_Population: Transgenic lines in Jack; hairy roots.
Pathway_Genes.Primary_Product: Reduced chalcone intermediate leading to liquiritigenin
Pathway_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: Expression significantly upregulated in GmMYB4 OE and GmMAPK6 OE, downregulated in gmmyb4; exact fold values NA.

Pathway_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Potential target to improve conversion toward flavanone/isoflavone intermediates.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Isomerizes chalcones to flavanones such as liquiritigenin/naringenin.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive contributor to isoflavone biosynthesis; expression increased by GmMYB4 and GmMAPK6.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Produces flavanone intermediates used by IFS.
Pathway_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: RNA-seq DEG and pathway candidate analysis.
Pathway_Genes.Genetic_Population: Transgenic lines in Jack; hairy roots.
Pathway_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: Expression significantly upregulated in GmMYB4 OE and GmMAPK6 OE, downregulated in gmmyb4; exact values NA.

Pathway_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Strong target for breeding and metabolic engineering to elevate seed and leaf isoflavone content.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Converts flavanones such as naringenin/liquiritigenin into isoflavones, yielding genistein/daidzein pathway products.
Pathway_Genes.Cofactor_or_Coenzyme_Requirement: Cytochrome P450; requires NADPH and oxygen
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Major positive determinant of isoflavone accumulation; expression promoted by GmMYB4 and GmMAPK6 and relieved from MBW repression.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR; overexpression phenotyping; Y1H for promoter binding by GmMYB115-GmTT8; dual-LUC promoter assay.
Pathway_Genes.Developmental_or_Physiological_Context: R2 leaves and R8 seeds for overexpression metabolite phenotypes; V3 leaves and transient promoter assays.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function: Established annotation; overexpression lines increased isoflavone content.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Terminal/direct branch enzyme for conversion of common flavanone substrate to isoflavones; promoter directly controlled by MBW complex.
Pathway_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: Candidate DEG and known pathway enzyme; additional overexpression validation.
Pathway_Genes.Genetic_Population: Transgenic lines in Jack; transient assays in N. benthamiana.
Pathway_Genes.Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: GmMYB4, GmMAPK6 and MBW complex perturbation.
Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: MBW complex suppresses GmIFS2 promoter activity, and GmMYB4 alleviates this suppression.
Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: Isoflavone-specific branch from common flavanone substrate
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Enhanced IFS2 may reduce flux to anthocyanins.
Pathway_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: GmIFS2 OE increased TIC 1.41-1.52-fold in R2 leaves and 1.36-1.77-fold in R8 seeds.

Pathway_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Potential target to increase isoflavone biosynthesis though less directly phenotyped than GmIFS2.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Converts flavanones into isoflavone products in the isoflavone branch.
Pathway_Genes.Cofactor_or_Coenzyme_Requirement: Cytochrome P450; requires NADPH and oxygen
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive contributor to isoflavone accumulation based on expression changes downstream of GmMYB4 and GmMAPK6.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Paralogous direct isoflavone-forming enzyme in terminal branch.
Pathway_Genes.Genetic_Population: Transgenic lines in Jack; hairy roots.
Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: No direct promoter assay shown in this paper.
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: May compete with anthocyanin branch for substrate.
Pathway_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: Expression significantly upregulated in GmMYB4 OE and GmMAPK6 OE and downregulated in gmmyb4; exact values NA.

Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Anthocyanin biosynthesis competing with isoflavone branch
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Reducing its activity may redirect common precursors toward isoflavone accumulation.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Oxidatively converts leucoanthocyanidins to anthocyanidins in anthocyanin biosynthesis.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Competing-branch gene inversely associated with isoflavone accumulation; activated by MBW complex and suppressed by GmMYB4/GmMAPK6.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR; anthocyanin measurements in transgenic lines; Y1H; dual-LUC.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function: Canonical annotation and anthocyanin branch role.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Uses shared flavanone-derived precursors via anthocyanin branch; promoter activated by MBW complex.
Pathway_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: RNA-seq DEG and candidate competing-branch gene.
Pathway_Genes.Genetic_Population: Transgenic lines in Jack; transient assays in N. benthamiana.
Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: GmMYB4 reduces MBW-mediated activation of GmANS3 promoter, consistent with lower anthocyanin content in overexpression lines.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Phenotypic_Effects: Leaf anthocyanin content decreased ~23% in GmMYB4 OE and increased 10-19% in gmmyb4 mutants.
Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: Anthocyanin branch competing for common flavanone precursor
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Suppressing ANS3 may lower anthocyanin-associated coloration or stress-related benefits.
Pathway_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: Expression decreased in GmMYB4 OE and GmMAPK6 OE, increased in gmmyb4 mutants; exact fold values NA.

Pathway_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Potential modifier of isoflavone composition, especially methylated derivatives.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promoter is target of GmMYB115-GmTT8 complex, indicating involvement in regulated phenylpropanoid/isoflavone metabolism.
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: required for storage/modification of target product
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Included among key pathway promoters bound by GmMYB115-GmTT8.
Pathway_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: Candidate pathway gene promoter chosen for Y1H testing.
Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: No expression or metabolite phenotype directly shown in this paper.
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Could alter composition rather than total content.

Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Phenylpropanoid pathway leading to isoflavone biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Important flux-control target for elevating phenylpropanoid-derived isoflavones.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positive upstream contributor to isoflavone accumulation; promoter bound by MBW complex and expression induced by GmMAPK6.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Y1H promoter-binding assay; RT-qPCR downstream-expression analysis.
Pathway_Genes.Developmental_or_Physiological_Context: Hairy roots for GmMAPK6 effects; yeast assays.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Generates activated hydroxycinnamoyl-CoA for entry into CHS step.
Pathway_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: Candidate pathway gene in promoter-binding and expression assays.
Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Promoter bound by GmMYB115-GmTT8; expression significantly affected by both GmMAPK6 and GmMAPKK2.
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Broad effects on many phenylpropanoid products.
Pathway_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: Expression significantly upregulated by GmMAPK6 OE and significantly affected by GmMAPKK2 OE; exact values NA.

Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Proanthocyanidin/flavonoid branch competing with isoflavone-related flux
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Potential branch-competition target, though specific impact on isoflavones not resolved here.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Reduces anthocyanidins to flavan-3-ols in proanthocyanidin biosynthesis.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promoter bound by GmMYB115-GmTT8, indicating inclusion in MBW-regulated flavonoid branch.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Downstream flavonoid branch gene under MBW control.
Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: No direct metabolite phenotype in this study.
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Changes may affect PA accumulation and seed coat traits.

Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Anthocyanin/flavonoid branch competing with isoflavone biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Potential target to reduce competing anthocyanin flux and favor isoflavones.
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydroxylates flavanones to dihydroflavonols in anthocyanin/flavonol biosynthesis.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Competing-branch gene under MBW promoter control.
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Acts on shared flavanone substrate that can also feed IFS-mediated isoflavone formation.
Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: One of the clearest metabolic competitors to isoflavone synthesis discussed in the paper.
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Lowering F3H may reduce anthocyanin/flavonol benefits.

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Transfers glucose to flavonoid or isoflavonoid aglycones, forming glycosides.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promoter is regulated by MBW-related factors, suggesting role in downstream modification/storage of flavonoid metabolites.
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: required for storage/modification of target product
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Likely acts in late modification/storage step of flavonoid/isoflavonoid metabolites.
Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Specific substrate not resolved in this paper.

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Candidate positive regulator for molecular breeding or metabolic engineering to increase soybean isoflavone content; favorable haplotype associated with higher glycitein class content.
Regulation_Genes.Chromosome_Position: Chr11 8153622-8271446 region for qGlc11; gene accession Glyma.11g107100
Regulation_Genes.Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation: Observed in soybean hairy roots, V3 leaves, R2-stage leaves, R8-stage seeds, and transient assays in N. benthamiana; also responsive within GmMAPK6 signaling context.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Positively regulates isoflavone accumulation and suppresses anthocyanin branch output.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: GWAS and haplotype analysis; hairy-root overexpression and RNAi; stable overexpression and CRISPR knockout; RNA-seq; RT-qPCR; DAP-seq; EMSA; LCI; BiFC; Y2H; dual-LUC.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Key positive regulator and central node of the GmMAPK6-GmMYB4-MBW module controlling isoflavone versus anthocyanin branch balance.
Regulation_Genes.Developmental_or_Physiological_Context: V3 stage leaves for transcriptomics; R2 full-blossom leaves and R8 mature seeds for metabolite phenotypes; hairy roots for preliminary validation.
Regulation_Genes.Direct_Binding_or_Direct_Target_Evidence: DAP-seq identified motif CACCTAAC and EMSA confirmed motif binding, but Y1H showed no direct binding of tested pathway-gene promoters; direct regulation of target metabolic genes unresolved/indirect.
Regulation_Genes.Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator: Indirect regulator of GmIFS2 and GmANS3 via interference with MBW complex assembly.
Regulation_Genes.Favorable_Allele: GmMYB4^H1 favorable haplotype associated with significantly higher GLC than GmMYB4^H2 across three environments.
Regulation_Genes.Field_Trials: GWAS panel of 219 accessions evaluated in field at Nanjing in 2014, 2015, and 2018 under natural conditions for seed isoflavone traits.
Regulation_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: GWAS followed by candidate-gene prioritization within qGlc11 based on annotation, flavonoid-related homology to Arabidopsis MYB4, and haplotype analysis.
Regulation_Genes.Genetic_Population: Natural soybean population of 219 accessions; stable transgenic lines in cultivar Jack; hairy roots in Jack.
Regulation_Genes.Interaction_with_Other_Regulators: Interacts with GmTT8, GmGL3, and GmEGL3; competes with GmMYB115 for GmTT8 binding; functionally opposes GmMYB115-GmTT8-GmTTG1 MBW complex activity; receives upstream regulation from GmMAPK6 and interacts with GmMAPKK2.
Regulation_Genes.Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Three field environments in Nanjing; controlled growth chamber conditions; transient expression in N. benthamiana.
Regulation_Genes.Key_Variant_Site: Multiple SNPs from 5' UTR to 3' UTR defining haplotypes H1, H2, H3; specific causal SNP not resolved.
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Isoflavone biosynthesis and branch competition with anthocyanin biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Metabolite_Assay_Method: UPLC-DAD at 260 nm for 12 isoflavones; spectrophotometric anthocyanin assay; flavonoid and proanthocyanidin colorimetric kits.
Regulation_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Although DAP-seq shows DNA-binding capability, tested isoflavone-pathway promoters were not directly bound by GmMYB4 in Y1H, supporting an MBW-interference mechanism rather than classic promoter activation.
Regulation_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq, DAP-seq, resequencing/GWAS; accession numbers NA (data stated in Supporting Information, no repository accession provided).
Regulation_Genes.Other_Phenotypic_Effects: Increases seed flavonoid and proanthocyanidin content; decreases leaf anthocyanin content in overexpression lines.
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: May reduce anthocyanin accumulation due to branch rebalancing; broader flavonoid remodeling possible.
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: Indirectly affects GmIFS2, GmANS3, GmPAL1.3, GmC4H, GmCHS8, GmCHR1, GmCHI1, GmIFS1 and other phenylpropanoid genes via MBW disruption.
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: R2R3-MYB transcription factor with bHLH-binding motif in R3 domain and EAR motif.
Regulation_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: Hairy-root OE increased TIC 156%, GEC 86%, DAC 154%, GLC 249%; RNAi decreased TIC 40%, GEC 31%, DAC 41%, GLC 42%. In stable OE leaves TIC 22-24%, GEC 29-30%, DAC 52-53%, GLC 15-16%; seeds TIC 17-32%, GEC 18-36%, DAC 8-23%, GLC 42-44%. Knockouts showed corresponding decreases; leaf anthocyanin fell ~23% in OE and rose 10-19% in mutants.
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Protein-protein interaction-mediated interference with MBW complex assembly; transcriptional modulation of downstream pathway genes; phosphorylation-responsive regulation by MAPK.
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Alleviates MBW-mediated repression of GmIFS2 and reduces MBW-mediated activation of GmANS3; positively associated with increased expression of multiple isoflavone biosynthetic genes.
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Scope: Multiple pathway genes and competing branch module.
Regulation_Genes.Target_Metabolite_Product: Total isoflavones including genistein, daidzein, and glycitein classes
Regulation_Genes.Tissue_or_Organ_of_Metabolite_Assessment: Hairy roots, R2-stage leaves, R8-stage seeds
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: GmMAPK6-mediated phosphorylation and positive transcriptional regulation; possible MAPK cascade input.
Regulation_Genes.Variety_or_Cultivar: Jack; candidate gene cloned from NJAU_32

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Potential regulator of flavonoid branch allocation, but its activity appears to repress isoflavone branch and promote anthocyanin-related targets, so likely a target for reducing to elevate isoflavones.
Regulation_Genes.Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation: Assayed mainly in transient interaction and promoter-binding systems in N. benthamiana and yeast.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Component of MBW complex that contributes to repression of GmIFS2 and activation of GmANS3.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: LCI, BiFC, Y1H, dual-LUC; prior study cited for MBW complex formation with GmTT8 and GmTTG1.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Acts as MYB component of MBW complex that is antagonized by GmMYB4 to shift flux toward isoflavones.
Regulation_Genes.Developmental_or_Physiological_Context: Transient expression assays and yeast assays; no dedicated developmental specificity reported in this paper.
Regulation_Genes.Direct_Binding_or_Direct_Target_Evidence: Y1H showed weak binding alone to promoters of GmANS3, GmOMT5, Gm4CL, GmIFS2, GmANR2, GmF3H1, GmUGT, GmPAL1.3, GmC4H, and GmCHS8; addition of GmTT8 enhanced promoter binding.
Regulation_Genes.Direct_or_Indirect_Regulator: Direct regulator when in complex with GmTT8.
Regulation_Genes.Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product: direct via direct regulation of key metabolic gene(s)
Regulation_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: Candidate gene selected as known soybean MBW-component MYB from prior literature; cloned for interaction studies.
Regulation_Genes.Interaction_with_Other_Regulators: Forms MBW complex with GmTT8 and GmTTG1; competes with GmMYB4 for GmTT8 interaction.
Regulation_Genes.Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Transient assay conditions in N. benthamiana.
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Branch selection between isoflavone and anthocyanin biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Metabolite_Assay_Method: Dual-LUC promoter assays infer metabolic control; no direct metabolite quantification for GmMYB115 alone in this paper.
Regulation_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Role inferred in this study primarily through complex behavior rather than standalone transgenic metabolite phenotyping.
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Likely promotes anthocyanin branch at expense of isoflavone branch.
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: Promoters of GmIFS2, GmANS3, GmOMT5, Gm4CL, GmANR2, GmF3H1, GmUGT, GmPAL1.3, GmC4H, and GmCHS8 when partnered with GmTT8.
Regulation_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: MBW complex overexpression significantly suppressed GmIFS2pro::LUC and strongly activated GmANS3pro::LUC; quantitative fold values not reported.
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Transcriptional regulation as MBW-complex MYB subunit.
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Represses GmIFS2 promoter activity and activates GmANS3 promoter activity in the GmMYB115-GmTT8-GmTTG1 complex.
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Scope: Specific branch-control module affecting multiple phenylpropanoid genes.
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Antagonized by GmMYB4 competition for GmTT8.
Regulation_Genes.Variety_or_Cultivar: NJAU_32 for cloning; N. benthamiana for transient assays

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Potential engineering target for redirecting flavonoid flux toward isoflavones by altering MBW complex formation.
Regulation_Genes.Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation: Functions as bHLH partner in transient assays and yeast systems; context dependent on MBW complex assembly.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: bHLH component required for GmMYB115-mediated regulation of isoflavone- and anthocyanin-related promoters; target of GmMYB4 competitive interference.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Central bHLH partner that enables MBW complex binding to target promoters and branch control.
Regulation_Genes.Developmental_or_Physiological_Context: Transient assays in N. benthamiana and yeast assays.
Regulation_Genes.Direct_Binding_or_Direct_Target_Evidence: Enhances GmMYB115 binding to promoters of multiple pathway genes in Y1H; as part of MBW complex affects GmIFS2 and GmANS3 reporter activity.
Regulation_Genes.Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product: direct via direct regulation of key metabolic gene(s)
Regulation_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: Candidate MBW bHLH chosen from prior knowledge and cloned for interaction studies.
Regulation_Genes.Interaction_with_Other_Regulators: Interacts with GmMYB4 and GmMYB115; functions with GmTTG1; interaction with GmMYB115 is disrupted by GmMYB4.
Regulation_Genes.Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Transient assay conditions in N. benthamiana.
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Flavonoid branch selection and downstream phenylpropanoid gene expression.
Regulation_Genes.Metabolite_Assay_Method: Dual-LUC promoter assay; no standalone metabolite assay for GmTT8 in this paper.
Regulation_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Parallels Arabidopsis TT8-like MBW control logic.
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Activity may favor anthocyanin over isoflavone branch in given MBW context.
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: In complex, affects GmIFS2, GmANS3, GmOMT5, Gm4CL, GmANR2, GmF3H1, GmUGT, GmPAL1.3, GmC4H, GmCHS8 promoters.
Regulation_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: No direct numeric metabolite effects reported; MBW complex significantly suppressed GmIFS2pro::LUC and activated GmANS3pro::LUC.
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Protein-protein interaction and transcriptional coregulation in MBW complex.
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Potentiates GmMYB115 promoter binding and MBW regulation of GmIFS2 and GmANS3.
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Scope: Multiple pathway genes within branch-control module.
Regulation_Genes.Variety_or_Cultivar: NJAU_32 for cloning; N. benthamiana for assays

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Secondary MBW-related target; may be manipulated for flavonoid/isoflavone flux control though direct metabolic effect not validated here.
Regulation_Genes.Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation: Detected in transient and yeast interaction assays only.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Interacts with GmMYB4 as a bHLH partner, suggesting possible participation in MBW-related regulation.
Regulation_Genes.Developmental_or_Physiological_Context: Transient assays in N. benthamiana and yeast.
Regulation_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: Candidate bHLH selected based on MBW homology and cloned for interaction testing.
Regulation_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Physical interaction established, but downstream regulatory consequences not directly tested in this paper.
Regulation_Genes.Variety_or_Cultivar: NJAU_32 for cloning; N. benthamiana for assays

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Secondary MBW-related target; potential manipulation point for flavonoid pathway control, though direct metabolic role unresolved in this paper.
Regulation_Genes.Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation: Detected in transient and yeast interaction assays only.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Interacts with GmMYB4 as a bHLH partner, indicating possible role in MBW-related regulation.
Regulation_Genes.Developmental_or_Physiological_Context: Transient assays in N. benthamiana and yeast.
Regulation_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: Candidate bHLH selected by homology/MBW framework and cloned for interaction testing.
Regulation_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Only physical interaction with GmMYB4 shown here.
Regulation_Genes.Variety_or_Cultivar: NJAU_32 for cloning; N. benthamiana for assays

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Potential partner target in MBW engineering to alter isoflavone/anthocyanin balance.
Regulation_Genes.Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation: Assayed as MBW component in transient dual-LUC experiments.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: WD-repeat component of MBW complex that participates in repression of GmIFS2 and activation of GmANS3 when assembled with GmMYB115-GmTT8.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Dual-LUC assay; prior study cited for complex formation with GmMYB115 and GmTT8.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Supportive cofactor required in tested MBW complex affecting pathway branch output.
Regulation_Genes.Developmental_or_Physiological_Context: Transient promoter assays in N. benthamiana.
Regulation_Genes.Direct_Binding_or_Direct_Target_Evidence: No direct DNA-binding evidence; acts as non-DNA-binding MBW component.
Regulation_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: Candidate WD-repeat MBW component cloned for dual-LUC assays.
Regulation_Genes.Interaction_with_Other_Regulators: Functions with GmMYB115 and GmTT8 in MBW complex; output antagonized by GmMYB4.
Regulation_Genes.Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Transient assay conditions in N. benthamiana.
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Flavonoid branch regulation through MBW assembly.
Regulation_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: TTG1 may not strongly affect promoter binding itself, but included in MBW functional assays.
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Could favor anthocyanin branch over isoflavones in this module.
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: GmIFS2 and GmANS3 promoters in MBW context.
Regulation_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: MBW complex containing GmTTG1 significantly suppressed GmIFS2pro::LUC and activated GmANS3pro::LUC; exact fold values NA.
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Contributes to MBW repression of GmIFS2 and activation of GmANS3.
Regulation_Genes.Variety_or_Cultivar: NJAU_32 for cloning; N. benthamiana for assays

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Promising upstream signaling target for enhancing isoflavone accumulation through both transcriptional and post-translational activation of GmMYB4.
Regulation_Genes.Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation: Demonstrated in soybean hairy roots and transient assays; likely MAPK-cascade dependent.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes isoflavone accumulation, upregulates GmMYB4 and multiple isoflavone biosynthetic genes, and phosphorylates GmMYB4.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: STRING-guided candidate identification; BiFC; Co-IP; Y2H with constitutively active mutant; in vitro kinase assay plus LC-MS/MS phosphosite mapping; hairy-root overexpression; RT-qPCR.
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Upstream kinase linking MAPK signaling to the GmMYB4-centered regulatory module; activates isoflavone biosynthesis at transcriptional and post-translational levels.
Regulation_Genes.Developmental_or_Physiological_Context: Hairy roots under overexpression conditions; in vitro phosphorylation reaction.
Regulation_Genes.Direct_Binding_or_Direct_Target_Evidence: Direct protein-target evidence: physical interaction with GmMYB4 by BiFC/Co-IP/Y2H and phosphorylation of Ser39 on GmMYB4 detected by LC-MS/MS after kinase reaction.
Regulation_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: PPI network prediction (STRING) followed by experimental validation.
Regulation_Genes.Genetic_Population: Hairy roots in cultivar Jack; transient assays in N. benthamiana.
Regulation_Genes.Interaction_with_Other_Regulators: Interacts with GmMYB4; possibly functions downstream of GmMAPKK2 in MAPK cascade though mechanistic chain not fully established here.
Regulation_Genes.Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Overexpression in hairy roots; constitutively active mutant used for kinase/interactions.
Regulation_Genes.Key_Variant_Site: Phosphorylates GmMYB4 at serine 39; constitutively active mutant CA-GmMAPK6 harbors D214G and E218A substitutions.
Regulation_Genes.Key_Variant_Type: Amino-acid substitution in engineered constitutively active protein; phosphorylation site on target protein
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Signal-dependent transcriptional and post-translational control of isoflavone biosynthesis.
Regulation_Genes.Metabolite_Assay_Method: UPLC-DAD for isoflavone content in hairy roots; LC-MS/MS for phosphorylation site identification; RT-qPCR for pathway-gene expression.
Regulation_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: In vivo phosphorylation remains to be verified according to authors; nevertheless direct kinase-substrate evidence is strong in vitro.
Regulation_Genes.Other_Phenotypic_Effects: Downregulates anthocyanin branch gene GmANS3 expression in hairy roots.
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: May suppress competing anthocyanin branch; broader MAPK pleiotropy possible but not assessed.
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: GmMYB4 protein and expression; indirectly increases GmPAL1.3, Gm4CL, GmCHI1, GmCHR1, GmIFS2, GmIFS1 and reduces GmANS3.
Regulation_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: Hairy-root overexpression significantly increased isoflavone content versus empty vector; exact percentages not clearly stated in text for GmMAPK6.
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Phosphorylation activation and positive transcriptional regulation of upstream/downstream pathway components.
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Upregulates GmMYB4, GmPAL1.3, Gm4CL, GmCHI1, GmCHR1, GmIFS2, GmIFS1; downregulates GmANS3.
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Scope: Multiple pathway genes through a central regulatory hub.
Regulation_Genes.Target_Metabolite_Product: Total isoflavones including genistein, daidzein, and glycitein classes
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: MAPK cascade input; possible activation by GmMAPKK2 inferred but not fully established.
Regulation_Genes.Variety_or_Cultivar: Jack; N. benthamiana for transient assays

Regulation_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Possible upstream signaling component for isoflavone engineering, but evidence is weaker and broader effects less consistent than for GmMAPK6.
Regulation_Genes.Condition_Dependence_of_Regulation: Demonstrated mainly in soybean hairy roots and transient assays.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Interacts with GmMYB4 and increases isoflavone content when overexpressed in hairy roots, but shows limited transcriptional effects on pathway genes compared with GmMAPK6.
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: STRING-guided prediction; BiFC; Co-IP; Y2H with constitutively active mutant; hairy-root overexpression; RT-qPCR.
Regulation_Genes.Developmental_or_Physiological_Context: Hairy roots under overexpression; transient interaction assays.
Regulation_Genes.Direct_Binding_or_Direct_Target_Evidence: Direct protein-target evidence limited to interaction with GmMYB4 by BiFC/Co-IP/Y2H; no phosphorylation of GmMYB4 shown in this paper.
Regulation_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: PPI network prediction (STRING) followed by validation.
Regulation_Genes.Genetic_Population: Hairy roots in Jack; transient assays in N. benthamiana.
Regulation_Genes.Interaction_with_Other_Regulators: Interacts with GmMYB4; likely related to GmMAPK6 cascade but direct kinase hierarchy not demonstrated.
Regulation_Genes.Key_Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Overexpression in hairy roots; constitutively active mutant CA-GmMAPKK2 contains T220D and T226D.
Regulation_Genes.Key_Variant_Site: Engineered constitutively active substitutions T220D and T226D.
Regulation_Genes.Key_Variant_Type: Amino-acid substitution in engineered constitutively active protein
Regulation_Genes.Metabolite_Assay_Method: UPLC-DAD for isoflavone content in hairy roots; RT-qPCR for pathway gene expression.
Regulation_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Overexpression significantly affected only Gm4CL, GmCHS8 and GmANS3 among tested genes, suggesting partial or context-dependent role.
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: Associated with altered expression of Gm4CL, GmCHS8, and GmANS3; direct targets unresolved.
Regulation_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: Hairy-root overexpression significantly increased isoflavone content versus empty vector; exact percentages not clearly reported in main text.
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Upstream signaling kinase interaction with GmMYB4; likely phosphorylation cascade component.
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Significantly affects Gm4CL, GmCHS8 and GmANS3 expression; broader downstream effects limited.
Regulation_Genes.Target_Metabolite_Product: Total isoflavones including genistein, daidzein, and glycitein classes
Regulation_Genes.Variety_or_Cultivar: Jack; N. benthamiana for transient assays

Title: GmMYB4 Positively Regulates Isoflavone Biosynthesis via the GmMAPK6-GmMYB4-MBW Module in Soybean
